description: Sector-specific screening controls for UK broadcast, online media, advertising, digital content, online-safety, audience protection, and marketing documentation.

metadata.scope: UK sector overlay controls for Media Sector Compliance Overlay. Intended to be used with uk_core_control_library.
metadata.source_note: Source basis is mapped from official UK legal/regulatory sources available at rule-pack publication time. This starter pack is not legal advice and requires expert validation before production reliance.
metadata.external_knowledge_policy: No external knowledge is introduced during document evaluation. Regulatory source mappings live only in this versioned rule pack.

primary_sources.name: Online Safety Act compliance guide for providers

limitations: Rules encode document-evidence checks, not a final legal determination.
Each rule requires validation against current UK laws, regulations, regulator notices, codes and guidance before production reliance.
UK rules may differ between England, Wales, Scotland and Northern Ireland; human reviewers must verify territorial applicability.

rules.title: Broadcasting Code compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for fairness, harm/offence, due impartiality, accuracy, protection of under-eighteens, or Ofcom Broadcasting Code evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.

rules.title: Online Safety Act risk-assessment or safety-duty evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for illegal harms risk assessment, children's risk assessment, safety duties, moderation, user reporting, or terms evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.
metadata.review_guidance: Automated results are evidence-based screening signals only. A qualified UK legal/compliance reviewer must confirm applicability, legal sufficiency, and treatment of missing evidence before reliance.
source_basis: Ofcom Online Safety Act compliance guide

rules.title: Advertising claims and CAP/BCAP compliance evidence is present
rules.summary: Checks for CAP Code, BCAP Code, substantiation, misleading advertising, pricing, testimonials, or ad approval evidence.

metadata.evidence_expectation: The reviewed document/document set should contain direct textual evidence for this control, or the engine should return missing/review_required according to the rule strategy.

rules.title: Audience/subscriber personal-data controls are documented
rules.summary: Checks for privacy notice, consent, data subject rights, lawful basis, subscriber data, or audience analytics privacy evidence.

rules.title: Complaints and editorial-review handling is documented
rules.summary: Checks for complaints process, editorial review, corrections, takedown, escalation, or regulator reporting evidence.
